Not just yet! Sure, it feels good to wallow in self-pity... But think of all the other people out there who are suffering -- people whom you could be helping right now.
I'm always helping other people! What about me, my pain? (Let the tears flow.)
Fine, don't cry, keep all those toxins in.
This is bullshit. My eyes are dry as a damn desert. [Discard thought.]
Wait, toxins? I don't want any toxins in my body... (Let the tears flow after all.)
You holding it together there, Meltdown Cop?
What? (Sniffle.) Of course I am.
I'm not. I'm really not.
Do you need to have a cry?
I don't cry. (Wipe your eye.)
So what if I do?
It's fine. Being a cop is tough. You can't be expected to keep it together *all the time*. Or, in your case, *much of the time*.
Let's just cut straight to the waterworks.
But why am I like this?
(Try to collect yourself.) Right, other people.
As you will. Let the tears flow.
Maybe it's your weak spine?
Your spine is pretty flimsy. It's like those foam swords that children play with.
No, my spine is tough as rebar.
Probably. My spine is soft and flimsy.
The lieutenant politely averts his eyes as two rivulets form on your cheeks.
Doesn't that feel better, Meltdown Cop?
It *does*. It really does.
But haven't I just embarrassed myself?
Good. Now wipe the snot from your sideburns. It's time to get back to work.
What? No, of course not. Probably no one even *noticed* your little *episode* just now...
Now wipe the snot from your sideburns. It's time to get back to work.
The sooner you accept what you are, the better.
The Ledger of Failure and Hatred is a special item that can be used both as an INTERACTABLE and a TOOL equipped in your HELD slot for skill bonuses. Find it under the TOOLS tab in your INVENTORY.
Zh: 失败和仇恨手册是一种特殊道具，可以互动，也可以装备在手中获得技能增益。你可以在道具栏的工具页下找到它。

En: You're back?
Zh: ”你回来了？”

En: Mhmh. Now drink. He raises the canister.
Zh: “嗯。现在喝吧。”他抬高了罐子。

En: Glowing lights on a dashboard emerge out of nothingness.
Zh: 虚无中浮现出仪表盘的亮光。

En: Just nod. [Leave.]
Zh: 只是点点头。[离开。]

En: Good.
Zh: “很好。”

En: I'm not coming back...
Zh: 我不会回去的……

En: Drink.
Zh: 喝下去。

En: Yes, they're *pouring* something on you -- something *in* you. And it's...
Zh: 是的，它们在你身上*倾倒*着什么——在你身体*里面*。那就是……

En: No. I don't wanna.
Zh: “不，我不要。”

En: There is no use arguing with me. You will die if you don't. His voice is pressing: "DRINK."
Zh: “跟我争辩是没用的。如果不喝，你就会死。”他的声音很急迫：“快喝。”

En: *Beeaautiful*... Believe me, stupid ape, its lack of beauty was *not* the problem.
Zh: *真美*啊……相信我，愚蠢的猩猩，缺乏美感*不是*问题所在。

En: There really *is* no use arguing with him. This is him exerting the reserves of authority he usually withholds. You can't even try to resist. All you can do is...
Zh: 跟他争辩确实*没什么*用处。他是在行使自己平时不怎么使用的权利。你甚至都不用尝试去抵抗。你唯一能做的只有……

En: There really *is* no use arguing with him. This is him exerting the reserves of authority he usually withholds.
Zh: 跟他争辩确实*没什么*用处。他是在行使自己平时不怎么使用的权利。

En: Where is Voyager Road?
Zh: 远航路在哪里？

En: Yeah, man, what was that about?
Zh: 是啊，伙计，那是怎么回事？

En: No, it was beautiful!
Zh: 不，它很美！

En: It didn't smell *nice*. It smelled like BETRAYAL.
Zh: 味道闻起来一点都*不好*，感觉更像是背叛。

En: No. Push it away.
Zh: “不。”把它推开。

En: ...bloated corpse of the past, resurfacing?
Zh: ……过去肿胀的尸体，又浮出水面？

En: Suit yourself. He caps the canister, uninterested in your petulance. With his brow furrowed he asks:
Zh: “随你便吧。”他拧上罐子，对你耍性子的行为毫无兴趣。他皱起眉头，然后问到：

En: Was that the ex-something? The...
Zh: 是不是那个旧日之物？那个……

En: The water is cold, silvery  -- the stuff of *life itself* as it pours down your parched throat. The pounding in your head recedes, the darkness parts.
Zh: 水很冷，泛着银色的光芒——*生命本身*沿着你的喉咙流淌而下。脑袋里嗡嗡作响的声音慢慢褪去，黑暗也渐渐远离。

En: Don't prod at it, it will start moving again.
Zh: 别戳它，它又会开始动的。

En: Drink. He tilts the canister. "You haven't drunk water in two days. Did you know the human body is not made to survive on alcohol *alone*? You need a secondary form of hydration."
Zh: “喝下去。”他歪起罐子。“你已经两天没喝过水了。你知道人类的身体不可能*只依靠*酒精存活下去吗？你需要第二种形式的水合作用。

En: Yes, that.
Zh: 是啊，那个。

En: Actually, beer and cider have *loads* of water in them.
Zh: 其实，啤酒和苹果酒里面也有*大量*水分。

En: There is nothing.
Zh: 什么也没有。

En: You know, in the Franconigerian centuries, the quality of water was so bad it was sometimes more hygienic to drink beer.
Zh: “你知道吗，在弗兰考格斯时代，水质特别差，有时候喝啤酒反而更卫生一些。”

En: Drink.
Zh: 喝下去。

En: There was something about a bow collector too...
Zh: 好像还有个弓形继电器什么的……

En: But these are not the *Franconigerian centuries*. We are in the present. It is safe to sometimes drink water here. He hands you the canister.
Zh: “但现在不是*弗兰考格斯时代*。我们正活在当下。在这里偶尔喝水是很安全的。”他把罐子递给你。

En: Again.
Zh: 又来了。

En: With greedy gulps, you down half a litre of cold water. Some of it spills on the driver's seat -- the lieutenant pays no heed to it.
Zh: 你贪婪地吞下了半升冷水。有些洒到了驾驶座上——警督没有注意到。

En: I should ask you the same.
Zh: “我应该问你相同的问题。”

En: So my name appears to be... Harry?
Zh: 所以我的名字好像是……哈里？

En: I came in contact with the burnt out ruins of the past, lieutenant. (Conclude.)
Zh: “我接触到了过去，那片被烧毁的废墟，警督。”（总结。）

En: Just lie there, passed out.
Zh: 只是躺在那里，晕厥过去。

En: I was dehydrated. It won't happen again. (Conclude.)
Zh: “我脱水了。这种事不会再发生了。”（总结。）

En: Nothing?
Zh: 什么也没有？

En: Oh, but you are. They're pouring something on you, *in* you. It's...
Zh: 哦，但是你会的。它们向你倾倒了一些东西，在你*心里*。那是……

En: You were reading your paperwork. Then you passed out. I carried you to my Kineema... to take you to a hospital. Then you came to.
Zh: “你刚才在看自己的文件，然后就晕过去了。我把你抬进了我的锐影……准备送你去医院。然后你醒了。”

En: Yeah, man. Fuck *everything*. Total blackout forever.
Zh: 是啊，伙计。让*一切*都见鬼去吧。永远地晕过去吧。

En: There was a call on the shortwave: officer passed out in Martinaise. He furrows his brow. "I had a feeling it would be you. I'm glad I got here in time."
Zh: “短波电台上传来呼叫信息：有个警官在马丁内斯晕倒了。”他皱起眉头。“我感觉可能就是你。很高兴我及时赶过来了。”

En: Let's solve this case. [Leave.]
Zh: “让我们解决这个案子吧。”[离开。]

En: What happened?
Zh: “出什么事了？”

En: Nothing, sad brother. No treachery. Just blackout.
Zh: 什么也没有，悲伤的兄弟。没有背叛。只是晕过去了。

En: Well, *almost* nothing. There is the ground below you. That's still there. And the small light that's on -- fluttering -- somewhere in the Basal Ganglia.
Zh: 呃，*差不多*什么也没有。你脚下有一片土地，现在也还在那里。还有那个打开的小灯，在基底神经节的某处颤抖着。

En: Because it's always there.
Zh: 因为它一直在那里。

En: How long was I out?
Zh: “我晕过去多久了？”

En: Tell him! Tell him!
Zh: 告诉他！告诉他！

En: Ten minutes maybe.
Zh: “大概10分钟吧。”

En: That's me, blue eyes. That's me.
Zh: 那就是我，蓝眼睛。就是我。

En: Who's that?
Zh: 那是谁？

En: Enough... just lie there, motionless.
Zh: 够了……静静躺着，一动不动。

En: I don't know. It could have been quite a while. He looks you in the eye, as if inspecting your mental state.
Zh: “我不知道。也许有很长一段时间吧。”他看着你的眼睛，就像是在检查你的精神状态。

En: You think they would let you -- until you disintegrate into biomolecules? No, someone is breathing on your face now, inspecting your pupils. Stupid idiot.
Zh: 你觉得他们会放着你不管——直到你分解成生物分子吗？不会的，你的脸颊上感到温热的呼吸，有人正在检查你的瞳孔。愚蠢的白痴。

En: There is no Voyager Road. There are no roads. No houses. No lights in the windows. It's all on *pause*.
Zh: 没有什么远航路。根本就没有路。没有房子。窗户里没有灯光。一切全都*暂停*了。

En: Smelled like betrayal.
Zh: 闻起来像是背叛的味道。

En: I... fuck it. Start climbing out of the motor-car. (Conclude.)
Zh: “我……该死。”开始往車外爬。（总结。）

En: And who was *that*?
Zh: *那*是谁？

En: That does sometimes happen. He hands you the remains of your ledger.
Zh: “有时候是会发生的。”他把剩下的手册递给你。

En: Right. he hands you the waterlogged remains of your ledger.
Zh: “好吧。”他把浸水的手册递给你。

En: Nice and quiet.
Zh: 美好又安静。

En: Good. He hands you the waterlogged remains of your ledger.
Zh: “很好。”他把浸水的手册递给你。

En: Ah, yes. And in the olfactory system they call it The Apricot Chewing Gum Scented One. It's unhealthy of them to linger on it so. But -- as they say -- what do you do?
Zh: 啊，是的。在嗅觉系统里，他们把它叫做杏味口香糖。一直这样流连是不健康的。但是——就像他们说的——你在做什么？

En: You dropped this -- are you okay to proceed?
Zh: “这个是你掉的——你还好吧，可以继续了吗？”

En: I found this next to you. He pauses. "I'll tag along for the rest of the day if you don't mind. My business is concluded anyway. Are you okay to go?"
Zh: “我在你身边找到的。”他停了一会儿。“如果你不介意的话，今天剩下的时间我会一直跟着你。反正我的工作已经结束了。你可以走了吗？”

En: Is it? The world is gone, you're no longer reacting to outward stimuli. Yet still...
Zh: 是吗？世界渐渐远去，你不再对外界的刺激做出反应了。只是……

En: Your name is *fuck all*.
Zh: 你的名字是*全他妈滚蛋*。

En: What is that? It's cold...
Zh: 那是什么？很冷……

En: Your name is *Passed Out on the Ground*. Dragged around by one of the other evil apes. They're taking you somewhere...
Zh: 你的名字是*在地板上晕过去*。被一只邪恶的类人猿拖来拖去。它们想带你去什么地方……

En: Who was what?
Zh: 什么是谁？

En: It's DELICIOUS.
Zh: 真的很美味。

En: Smelled so nice...
Zh: 很好闻……

En: ...a bitter, caustic sense of loss remains. Even in the darkness, great sorrows slip in the water -- slimy.
Zh: ……一种微苦、腐蚀性的失落感依然存在。就算在黑暗之中……那片巨大的悲痛感也还是——浓厚而粘腻。

En: He replies with such understanding it's as if the burnt out ruins of the past were an occupational hazard -- athlete's foot for cops.
Zh: 他非常体谅地回复到，感觉好像过去那片烧毁的废墟是一种职业危害——警察的香港脚。

En: In the upholstered cabin of Lieutenant Kitsuragi's motor carriage, seated in the driver's basket. The air is thick with leatherworks and heavy fuel oil. Cold water runs down your chin.
Zh: 在曷城警督爱车的软垫乘车舱，坐在司机位上。空气里充满了皮具和重燃油的味道。冷水从你的下巴滑落。

En: No, I was *cool*. I'm cool.
Zh: 不，我曾经很*酷*，现在也很酷。

En: The cool when you're dead, brother.
Zh: 你死后就又凉又酷了，兄弟。

En: Yeah, that's the stuff!
Zh: 是啊，就是这样！

En: ...where am I?
Zh: ……我在哪？

En: He speaks of the *sickening* longing, the unwell emotion. Even in the darkness he's grasping for it, still trying to hold on to the great sorrows slipping in the water -- slimy.
Zh: 他提到了*令人作呕*的热望，还有不舒服的情绪。就算身处黑暗他也要抓住，试着把那滑入水中的巨大悲伤紧紧攥在手心——湿滑粘腻。

En: You know, I'm actually more of a *magnesium* based lifeform now.
Zh: “你知道的，其实现在我已经更像是一种*镁*基生命体了。”

En: That's just a drug addict myth. In reality you're still comprised of dihydrogen oxide, which you must replenish to go on living.
Zh: “那只不过是瘾君子的神话。事实是，你还是由一氧化二氢组成的，必须不断补充才能继续生存下去。”

En: Glowing lights on a dashboard emerge out of nothingness.
Zh: 仪表板上闪烁的灯光从一片虚无中浮现。

En: Drink -- water. The lieutenant is extending a small canister to your mouth.
Zh: “喝——水。”警督把一个小罐子伸到你的嘴边。

En: Here in the Paleo-Mammalian Cortex we call it -- *the shadow*.
Zh: 这就是我们口中的古哺乳动物大脑皮质——*阴影*。

En: Then what is it?
Zh: 那它是什么？

En: It certainly ain't Harry.
Zh: 肯定不是哈里。

En: JUMP.

How the rill may rest there / Down through the mist there / Toward the seven sisters / Toward those pale cliffs there

I would often stay there / In there tiny yard there / I have been so glad here / Looking forward to the past here

But now you are alone /None of this matters at all
